g.title: vandelay.match_set:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: vandelay.match_set_point:match_set->vandelay.match_set:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (match_set) REFERENCES vandelay.match_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: vandelay.queue:match_set->vandelay.match_set:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (match_set) REFERENCES vandelay.match_set(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.match_set_quality:match_set->vandelay.match_set:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (match_set) REFERENCES vandelay.match_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
